Ackerman & Co. and MDH Partners are continuing the transformation of Lee + White, a model of adaptive re-use development.

meta.meta_description: Lee + White has emerged as one of AtlantaГўВҖВҷs most exciting mixed-use destinations. The redevelopment of the West End communityГўВҖВҷs former ГўВҖВңWarehouse RowГўВҖВқ showcases a mix of cutting-edge breweries, restaurants, retailers and food manufacturers. Now Ackerman & Co. and MDH Partners are moving forward with the next phase in the transformation of Lee + White, a model of adaptive re-use development.  With a focus on contributing to the growth and energy of AtlantaГўВҖВҷs historic West End, the next chapter in the Lee + White redevelopment will diversify the projectГўВҖВҷs offerings to include a food hall, unique retail spaces and creative loft offices.  The ongoing redevelopment will continue in a spirit that recognizes the West EndГўВҖВҷs rich history while seeking community input to create an authentic urban experience. This development philosophy will expand an already diverse roster of tenants who are proud to be a part of the West End community and one of AtlantaГўВҖВҷs trendsetting mixed-use developments.
